verbatim_quote: So that's gonna take a long time, 'cause for each mutation you make like that, you have to run many examples through the net to see if it really helps, or if it just helps on a few examples, but hurts on most of them. There's a better way to do the same thing, that is what we really want to do is figure out how to change your weight.
